title: galium umbellatum var. lapeyrouseanum
intro: Galium umbellatum var. lapeyrouseanum, also known as Lapeyrouse's bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium umbellatum species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Galium umbellatum var. lapeyrouseanum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestive health, and act as an antiseptic agent to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
